interfaces.name: BigNumber
interfaces.signature: struct BigNumber: Codable, Comparable, CustomStringConvertible { var mantissa: Double; var exponent: Int; init(mantissa: Double, exponent: Int); init(_ value: Double); static let zero: BigNumber; static func + (lhs: BigNumber, rhs: BigNumber) -> BigNumber; static func * (lhs: BigNumber, rhs: BigNumber) -> BigNumber; static func * (lhs: BigNumber, rhs: Double) -> BigNumber; mutating func normalize(); func formatted() -> String }
interfaces.notes: Mantissa/exponent numeric engine; every lane touches this for currency/multipliers. Normalize must guard against mantissa->0/NaN and exponent overflow per architecture review.

interfaces.name: SpecimenCategory
interfaces.signature: enum SpecimenCategory: String, Codable, CaseIterable { case fossil, mineral, flora, fauna, artifact }
interfaces.notes: Non-color matching axis; glyph/icon is source of truth, color is decoration.

interfaces.name: Region
interfaces.signature: enum Region: String, Codable, CaseIterable { case desert, polarIce, rainforest, deepSea, highlands, patronVault }
interfaces.notes: patronVault is the Patron-exclusive region, hidden from free users in ContentCatalog filtering.

interfaces.name: Era
interfaces.signature: enum Era: String, Codable, CaseIterable { case precambrian, paleozoic, mesozoic, cenozoic }

interfaces.name: Rarity
interfaces.signature: enum Rarity: Int, Codable, CaseIterable, Comparable { case common = 1, uncommon = 2, rare = 3, legendary = 4 }
interfaces.notes: Used as scoring weight in RarityThresholdScoringEngine.

interfaces.name: SpecimenDefinition
interfaces.signature: struct SpecimenDefinition: Codable, Identifiable { let id: String; let displayName: String; let category: SpecimenCategory; let region: Region; let era: Era; let rarity: Rarity; let glyphSymbolName: String; let colorTokenKey: String; let flavorText: String; let regionExclusiveToPatron: Bool }
interfaces.notes: Static content, loaded from bundled JSON, never part of MuseumSnapshot.

interfaces.name: SpecimenLocation
interfaces.signature: enum SpecimenLocation: Codable, Equatable { case intakeTray; case unplacedHolding; case placed(wingID: UUID, slotID: UUID) }
interfaces.notes: No delete case exists by design -- enforces non-destructive placement at the type level.

interfaces.name: Specimen
interfaces.signature: struct Specimen: Codable, Identifiable, Equatable { let id: UUID; let definitionID: String; var isCataloged: Bool; var location: SpecimenLocation }
interfaces.notes: Owned instance; joins to SpecimenDefinition via definitionID.

interfaces.name: WingType
interfaces.signature: enum WingType: String, Codable, CaseIterable { case adjacencyGrid, rowCollection, rarityThreshold }
interfaces.notes: Third case (rarityThreshold) subject to pre-authorized demotion to should-have if implementation can't show a genuinely distinct scoring rule from adjacencyGrid.

interfaces.name: SlotPosition
interfaces.signature: enum SlotPosition: Codable, Equatable { case grid(row: Int, col: Int); case row(rowIndex: Int, position: Int); case tier(tierIndex: Int, position: Int) }
interfaces.notes: Structural proof that the three wing shells are not the same grid relabeled.

interfaces.name: Slot
interfaces.signature: struct Slot: Codable, Identifiable, Equatable { let id: UUID; var position: SlotPosition; var placedSpecimenID: UUID? }

interfaces.name: Wing
interfaces.signature: struct Wing: Codable, Identifiable { let id: UUID; var wingType: WingType; var slots: [Slot]; var isDonated: Bool; var donatedAt: Date?; var isPatronExclusive: Bool }

interfaces.name: WingLayoutTemplate
interfaces.signature: struct WingLayoutTemplate: Decodable { let wingType: WingType; let slotCount: Int; let matchingRuleDescription: String; func makeSlots() -> [Slot] }
interfaces.notes: Content-defined; matchingRuleDescription feeds the always-visible plaque text.

interfaces.name: ExpeditionDestination
interfaces.signature: struct ExpeditionDestination: Codable, Identifiable { let id: String; let displayName: String; let cost: BigNumber; let duration: TimeInterval; let specimenPool: [String]; let requiresPatron: Bool }
interfaces.notes: Static content.

interfaces.name: ActiveExpedition
interfaces.signature: struct ActiveExpedition: Codable, Identifiable { let id: UUID; let destinationID: String; let slotIndex: Int; let startDate: Date; let returnDate: Date; var isCollected: Bool }
interfaces.notes: returnDate is absolute; remaining time is always returnDate - now, clamped >= 0, never a decrementing counter.

interfaces.name: PrestigeRecord
interfaces.signature: struct PrestigeRecord: Codable, Identifiable { let id: UUID; let wingID: UUID; let donatedAt: Date; let grantedBonusMultiplier: BigNumber; let wingTypeAtDonation: WingType }

interfaces.name: PatronEntitlement
interfaces.signature: struct PatronEntitlement: Codable, Equatable { var isActive: Bool; var expirationDate: Date? }
interfaces.notes: Sourced from StoreKit at runtime, not from MuseumSnapshot -- this separation is what makes the restore-mismatch state representable.

interfaces.name: MuseumSnapshot
interfaces.signature: struct MuseumSnapshot: Codable { var schemaVersion: Int; var currency: BigNumber; var wings: [Wing]; var specimens: [UUID: Specimen]; var activeExpeditions: [ActiveExpedition]; var prestigeHistory: [PrestigeRecord]; var hasCompletedOnboarding: Bool; var lastKnownGoodDate: Date }
interfaces.notes: The only thing written to disk. Never contains static content or Patron entitlement.

interfaces.name: ContentCatalog
interfaces.signature: struct ContentCatalog: Decodable { let specimenDefinitions: [String: SpecimenDefinition]; let expeditionDestinations: [ExpeditionDestination]; let wingLayouts: [WingType: WingLayoutTemplate] }
interfaces.notes: Loaded once from bundled JSON at launch; immutable for the process lifetime.

interfaces.name: ContentCatalogLoader
interfaces.signature: enum ContentCatalogLoader { static func loadFromBundle(bundle: Bundle = .main) throws -> ContentCatalog }

interfaces.name: ScreenState
interfaces.signature: enum ScreenState<Success> { case loading; case empty; case success(Success); case error(String) }
interfaces.notes: Every one of the 10 screens' view-facing state must use this shape, not a bespoke per-screen enum.

interfaces.name: WingScoringEngine
interfaces.signature: protocol WingScoringEngine { func currentMultiplier(for wing: Wing, specimens: [UUID: Specimen], catalog: ContentCatalog) -> BigNumber; func isSetComplete(for wing: Wing, specimens: [UUID: Specimen], catalog: ContentCatalog) -> Bool }
interfaces.notes: Pure functions, no SwiftUI import; one implementation per WingType case.

interfaces.name: AdjacencyScoringEngine
interfaces.signature: struct AdjacencyScoringEngine: WingScoringEngine
interfaces.notes: Region/era/type/color-family adjacency on a LazyVGrid-shaped slot layout.

interfaces.name: RowCollectionScoringEngine
interfaces.signature: struct RowCollectionScoringEngine: WingScoringEngine
interfaces.notes: Each row scores independently as it fills.

interfaces.name: RarityThresholdScoringEngine
interfaces.signature: struct RarityThresholdScoringEngine: WingScoringEngine
interfaces.notes: Scores by weighted rarity value crossing a tier threshold, not identity-matching -- must be verified structurally distinct from AdjacencyScoringEngine or demoted per the pre-authorized gate.

interfaces.name: OfflineProgressCalculator
interfaces.signature: enum OfflineProgressCalculator { static func clampedElapsed(now: Date, lastKnownGood: Date) -> TimeInterval; static func advancedExpeditions(_ expeditions: [ActiveExpedition], to now: Date) -> [ActiveExpedition]; static func overflowRefund(intakeCount: Int, capacity: Int, refundPerSpecimen: BigNumber) -> (kept: Int, refunded: Int, currency: BigNumber) }
interfaces.notes: clampedElapsed is the 5-line clock-jump guard from architecture review; must be independently unit-testable.

interfaces.name: PersistenceControlling
interfaces.signature: protocol PersistenceControlling { func load() throws -> MuseumSnapshot; func save(_ snapshot: MuseumSnapshot) throws }
interfaces.notes: Enables fault-injection testing via a mock conformance.

interfaces.name: FileMuseumPersistenceController
interfaces.signature: struct FileMuseumPersistenceController: PersistenceControlling { init(directory: URL) }
interfaces.notes: Temp-file + replaceItemAt atomic write, applicationSupportDirectory, included in iCloud device backup.

interfaces.name: PersistenceError
interfaces.signature: enum PersistenceError: Error, Equatable { case decodingFailed; case writeFailed; case noSavedSnapshot }

interfaces.name: PatronEntitlementManaging
interfaces.signature: protocol PatronEntitlementManaging { var currentEntitlement: PatronEntitlement { get async }; func purchase() async throws -> PatronEntitlement; func restore() async throws -> PatronEntitlement; func observeUpdates(_ onChange: @escaping (PatronEntitlement) -> Void) }
interfaces.notes: StoreKit 2 backed; Transaction.currentEntitlements + Transaction.updates listener.

interfaces.name: StoreKitPatronManager
interfaces.signature: actor StoreKitPatronManager: PatronEntitlementManaging

interfaces.name: DispatchEligibility
interfaces.signature: enum DispatchEligibility: Equatable { case allowed; case blocked(reason: String) }

interfaces.name: CatalogResult
interfaces.signature: enum CatalogResult: Equatable { case correct; case correctedTo(SpecimenCategory) }

interfaces.name: PlacementResult
interfaces.signature: enum PlacementResult: Equatable { case placed; case setCompleted(newMultiplier: BigNumber); case setBroken(newMultiplier: BigNumber); case rejected(reason: String) }
interfaces.notes: UI fires the protected set-completion animation directly off .setCompleted, no polling.

interfaces.name: DonationResult
interfaces.signature: enum DonationResult: Equatable { case donated(bonus: BigNumber); case rejected(reason: String) }

interfaces.name: GameStoreLoadState
interfaces.signature: enum GameStoreLoadState: Equatable { case loading; case ready; case decodeFailed }
interfaces.notes: Drives Museum Overview's error state; resetAndStartFresh() is the only path out of decodeFailed and requires explicit user confirmation.

interfaces.name: GameStore
interfaces.signature: @MainActor @Observable final class GameStore { private(set) var snapshot: MuseumSnapshot; private(set) var catalog: ContentCatalog; private(set) var patronEntitlement: PatronEntitlement; private(set) var loadState: GameStoreLoadState; init(persistence: PersistenceControlling, catalog: ContentCatalog, patronManager: PatronEntitlementManaging); func dispatchExpedition(destinationID: String, slot: Int) -> DispatchEligibility; func collectReadyExpeditions(now: Date); func catalogSpecimen(id: UUID, guessedCategory: SpecimenCategory) -> CatalogResult; func placeSpecimen(id: UUID, wingID: UUID, slotID: UUID) -> PlacementResult; func removeSpecimen(id: UUID) -> PlacementResult; func donateWing(id: UUID) -> DonationResult; func refreshOfflineProgress(now: Date); func resetAndStartFresh(); func save(); func purchasePatron() async; func restorePurchases() async }
interfaces.notes: Single source of truth; every screen reads slices of snapshot/catalog/patronEntitlement and writes only through these methods. Internally schedules a debounced save on every mutation plus an unconditional save on scenePhase .background (hooked from CurioApp).

interfaces.name: AppRoute
interfaces.signature: enum AppRoute: Hashable { case wingInterior(UUID); case donateConfirm(UUID); case gallery; case showcase(UUID) }
interfaces.notes: NavigationStack path type; transient @State only, never persisted.

interfaces.name: MuseumOverviewView
interfaces.signature: struct MuseumOverviewView: View
interfaces.notes: Binds to GameStore.loadState via ScreenState; hosts WingSummaryCard list.

interfaces.name: ExpeditionDeskView
interfaces.signature: struct ExpeditionDeskView: View

interfaces.name: IntakeTrayView
interfaces.signature: struct IntakeTrayView: View

interfaces.name: CatalogingSheetView
interfaces.signature: struct CatalogingSheetView: View
interfaces.notes: Sheet-presented, not pushed.

interfaces.name: WingInteriorView
interfaces.signature: struct WingInteriorView: View
interfaces.notes: Switches rendering shell on wing.wingType; shared tap-select/tap-place primitive via SlotButton.

interfaces.name: DonateWingConfirmView
interfaces.signature: struct DonateWingConfirmView: View
interfaces.notes: Full sheet, not .alert.

interfaces.name: GalleryView
interfaces.signature: struct GalleryView: View

interfaces.name: ShowcaseView
interfaces.signature: struct ShowcaseView: View

interfaces.name: PatronStoreView
interfaces.signature: struct PatronStoreView: View

interfaces.name: SettingsView
interfaces.signature: struct SettingsView: View

interfaces.name: OnboardingOverlay
interfaces.signature: struct OnboardingOverlay: View
interfaces.notes: Gated by snapshot.hasCompletedOnboarding.

interfaces.name: WingSummaryCard
interfaces.signature: struct WingSummaryCard: View

interfaces.name: WingMiniGrid
interfaces.signature: struct WingMiniGrid: View
interfaces.notes: Shared render, non-interactive small-scale variant, reused by Overview/Gallery/Showcase.

interfaces.name: CountdownText
interfaces.signature: struct CountdownText: View
interfaces.notes: TimelineView(.periodic) scoped strictly to this text, never a view-wide Timer.publish.

interfaces.name: PersistentBanner
interfaces.signature: struct PersistentBanner: View
interfaces.notes: One component, used for tray overflow-refund and Patron restore-mismatch messaging.

interfaces.name: EmptyStateView
interfaces.signature: struct EmptyStateView: View

interfaces.name: ErrorStateView
interfaces.signature: struct ErrorStateView: View
